retrieval.latency_accounting: The wider recall deadline is benchmark transport margin only; per-row recall_duration_ms remains the measured latency and product-facing Fast SLOs are unchanged.

isolation.unit: one official question per harness invocation
isolation.tenant: fresh packaged-CLI tenant per Memory instance
isolation.scope: fresh server-bound subject, scope, actor, and agent node per Memory instance
isolation.shared_haystack_reuse: rejected by the adapter's single-question invariant

proof.pairing: query fails unless the packaged worker compiles every retained resource, trace tenant/scope/actor/context/citations exactly match public recall, and the only schema mutation during recall is one retrieval_trace audit row

execution_matrix.pairing: Within every domain/tier cell, both arms must use identical question IDs, reader contract, judge contract, and context ceiling; all questions must complete without errors.

packaged_fixture_dry_run.command: cargo build -p memphant-server -p memphant-cli -p memphant-worker && MEMPHANT_LME_PACKAGED_INTEGRATION=1 MEMPHANT_SCRATCH_ACTIVE=1 bash scripts/with_scratch_db.sh postgres://memphant:memphant@localhost:5432/memphant MEMPHANT_TEST_DATABASE_URL python3 -m pytest tests/test_public_benchmark_adapters.py::test_memphant_memory_tiny_packaged_rest_dry_run -q
